description:
International day of Yoga celebrations at Helsinki in Finland (at Merisatamanranta, Helsinki)

Facebook: https://facebook.com/yoga.in.finland
Event page: https://www.facebook.com/events/363717310502461/

Event agenda:

15.50 : Ambassador on stage welcoming everyone and saying a few words about IDY
16.01 : Gratitude to our sponsors and Introduction or Asana group participants
16.05 : Asana practices begin
16.50 : Asanas end. Asana group leaves and Pranayama group enter
16.52 : Pranayama and meditations group begins
17.35 : Meditation ends and Aarti enters. Mayank Introduces Aarti and Dance begins
17.50 : Tagore Ensemble enters with introduction
18.10:  Sahaja Unlimited with introduction
18.25: Qawwali Bros with introduction
18.45 : Thanking everyone and pack up begins
